title: Did ball hit spidercam before England goal? Snicko says not - Norway unsure
summary: Norway contests England's controversial quarter-final victory, claiming the ball may have struck a spidercam during Jude Bellingham's equalizer; Snicko technology indicates no contact, but the goal stands as confirmed by officials. The incident leaves Norway frustrated after their World Cup campaign ends in defeat.
content: Norway's World Cup campaign ends in a quarter-final defeat by England, but they leave frustrated, arguing that Jude Bellingham's equaliser should not have counted.

zh.title: 球在英格兰进球前击中蜘蛛摄像机了吗？Snicko说没有——挪威不确定
zh.summary: 挪威对英格兰有争议的四分之一决赛胜利提出异议，声称球可能在朱德·贝林厄姆的扳平球时击中了蜘蛛摄像机；Snicko技术表明没有接触，但该球已被官员确认有效。这一事件在挪威世界杯战役以失败告终后让他们感到沮丧。

title: Pick your England XI for World Cup semi-final
summary: Readers are invited to select their ideal England starting XI for the upcoming World Cup semi-final as the team advances from its quarter-final victory over Norway.
content: England are through to the World Cup semi-finals, but who would you pick in your starting XI?

zh.title: 为世界杯半决赛挑选你的英格兰首发十一人
zh.summary: 邀请读者为即将到来的世界杯半决赛选择他们理想的英格兰首发十一人，因为该队从对挪威的四分之一决赛胜利中晋级。

title: England into semi-finals - what is their path to the final?
summary: England has advanced to the World Cup semi-finals to face Argentina or Switzerland; BBC Sport analyzes the tactical and strategic challenges the team must overcome to reach the final.
content: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the World Cup final after progressing to the semi-finals.

zh.title: 英格兰进入半决赛——他们通向决赛的道路是什么？
zh.summary: 英格兰已进入世界杯半决赛，将面对阿根廷或瑞士；BBC体育分析了球队必须克服的战术和战略挑战以到达决赛。
